summary: Yongsan's 2020 race was the closest in Seoul: 권영세 (UFP) 47.80 vs 강태웅 (DPK) 47.14 — a 0.66pp margin, almost flipping to DPK. Pre-presidential-office-relocation; the swing-district pattern was clearer than in 2024.

issues.label: Candidate strength
issues.description: Both candidates well-known; 권영세's personal brand barely held.

issues.label: Pro-Moon wave nearly flipped seat
issues.description: 0.66pp margin showed Yongsan's responsiveness to national wave.

issues.label: Mixed residential / commuter base
issues.description: Older Yongsan plus commercial/commuter mix; no single dominant demographic.
